sections.title: Output Type Scoping
sections.content:
| OT | Name | Hydronic Circuit? | Sensor Fit |
|---|---|---|---|
| OT-1 | Residential Split/Packaged AC | No | — |
| OT-2 | Water-Source Heat Pump | **Yes** | **Primary fit** — water loop flow measurement |
| OT-3 | Warm Air Furnace | No | — |
| OT-4 | Commercial Rooftop Unit | No | — |
| OT-5 | Water-Cooled Chiller | **Yes** | **Primary fit** — chilled water + condenser water loops |
| OT-6 | Commercial Refrigeration | No | — |
| OT-7 | Industrial Refrigeration | Partial | Secondary fit — glycol loop ≤50% |

sections.title: Marquardt Sensor Placement
sections.content:
```
OT-2 / OT-5 End Product
└── L4-C  Hydronic Circuit Subsystem
    └── L3-C2  Flow & Temperature Measurement Assembly
        └── L2-C2a  Flow sensor body + transducer pair   ← Marquardt DN20
            ├── L1-C2a-1  PZT piezo transducer pair (A+B)
            ├── L1-C2a-2  DN20 flow tube (PPS/PVDF/brass)
            └── L1-C2a-3  Signal processing PCB
                └── L0-5  PZT ceramic
                └── L0-6  PPS / PVDF polymer
```

**Sensor technology share at L2-C2a:** Ultrasonic transit-time **45%** (fastest growing, non-invasive) · Vortex 25% · Electromagnetic 20% · Turbine 10%.

sections.title: Per-Output-Type BOM Trees
sections.content:
> Full L4 → L0 decomposition for each of the 7 output types produced by NAICS 333415. Alternatives shown with market share % where real data exists; confidence rated HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW. Branches are decomposed deeper where technology or material choices exist; commodity branches with no meaningful alternatives are abbreviated.

---

### OUTPUT TYPE: OT-1 — Residential Split/Packaged AC

### OUTPUT TYPE: OT-7 — Industrial Refrigeration Equipment

> Sub-types: Ammonia (R-717) packaged systems · CO₂ (R-744) transcritical systems · HFC legacy systems · Blast freezers · Cold storage · Industrial process cooling. **Copper and copper alloys are PROHIBITED in ammonia service** — ammonia attacks copper forming explosive copper-ammonia complexes. All refrigerant-wetted metalwork must be carbon steel, cast iron, or 316L stainless. This makes OT-7 the only output type in NAICS 333415 where the standard copper-tube BOM is entirely absent.

bom_levels.L4: Subsystem — part of a system with system properties of its own (ISO 15288)
bom_levels.L3: Module — self-contained functional unit with defined interfaces (IEC 61131-3)
bom_levels.L2: Assembly — two or more parts forming a re-disassemblable functional unit (DIN EN ISO 10209)
bom_levels.L1: Part — non-demountable object manufactured per a work plan (DIN EN ISO 10209)
bom_levels.L0: Raw material — substance defined by chemical/physical properties, no geometry (DIN 8580)
